creator: georg@graf.priv.at
text:
First of all thanks for maintaining this port.

I was unable to start the ido2db (configured for mysql backend) until I found out
that a simple install of "libdbi-drivers" helped to solve the problem. Before
that, "service ido2db start" complained with "Support for the specified
database server is either not yet supported, or was not found on your system."

The libdbi-drivers package is quite small and won't hurt too much.

Thank you!
